title: Pay your fees for a Canadian passport, a travel document or other services - Canada.ca
content:
## Pay your fees for a Canadian passport, a travel document or other services

## Passport and travel document service fees have increased
As of March 31, 2026 , most fees for passports and travel document services have increased. Learn how these changes may affect your application .
Answer the questions below to get payment instructions.
You can’t pay online for many in-Canada passport services. Confirm your payment options before you pay online.

## How to pay your fees
Travel documents for non-Canadians (certificates of identity and refugee travel documents) are only issued
        from
        within Canada.

## A travel document (refugee travel document or certificate of identity)
Travel documents for non-Canadians (certificates of identity and refugee travel documents) are only issued
        from within Canada.
